SweepBJJ Tracker & Journal

Get on top of your game.

Log your rolls in seconds. Sweep turns them into a rich analysis of your training, giving you the data you need to improve your game: your real finish rates, positional gaps, where you struggle, and how you're improving against training partners over time. Pay once and leave the expensive subscriptions behind. Your data never leaves your phone.

Coming soon to Google Play Pay once. No subscription. No AI. Data stays on your phone.

You train like you mean it. The real question is whether all that work is adding up.

Sweep makes sure it does. Every session you log compounds into a sharper game and a more direct path to mastery.

Belt journey

Your game evolves. Sweep remembers every belt.

From your first class to the day you tap someone a belt above you, Sweep keeps a record at every rank, and shows your game getting sharper from white toward black.

Trends over time

Watch yourself close the gap.

Sweep compares two stretches of your training to show whether you're closing the gap on the belts above you. Then tap any rank to drill in and see exactly which techniques you're landing, and which ones still catch you.

Partner rivalries

Know exactly who's gaining on you.

Sweep tracks every roll with your training partners, giving you rich insights into your performance over time. See who you're gaining on and who you struggle against. Open any partner for the exact techniques you trade. Actionable information for better goal-setting and development.

Competition

Walk in ready. Walk out knowing.

Keep a prep journal, track your weight cut, and set your match goals. Log every match, then see your real competition record, your medals, and exactly how the wins came.

Why grapplers keep it

Three things Sweep does that a notebook never will.

See your game

Your real finish rates and the leaks you can't feel while rolling, finally visible.

Train with intention

Coach cues, focus areas, and gameplans that turn random rounds into deliberate work.

Yours, forever

No account, no cloud, no subscription. Pay once, and export everything anytime.

How it works

Log fast. Tap, don't type.

The moves are already in Sweep. A full session logs in under a minute, and the analysis builds itself from there.

1

Log the session

Gi or no-gi, who you rolled, what you caught and what caught you. Hundreds of submissions, sweeps, passes, takedowns and escapes are built in.

2

Sweep reads it back

Your game mapped by position and belt, your finish rates, your rivalries, and the parts of your game that have gone quiet.

3

Train with a plan

Set the few things you're building, save the cues you'd forget, and watch them actually develop, round after round.

Your whole game, in one place

Focus, gameplans, goals, all on one screen.

Your home screen is your training at a glance. The few things you're working on, the techniques you've drilled, your goals, your move-by-move gameplans, your tournaments, and the milestones you've earned. Open the app and you know exactly where you stand.

Still more in the read

Mapped by position

Mount and side control are where you score. Standing and leg entanglements are where you leak.

Drilled vs landing

34 techniques drilled, 16 landing live. See which moves from class actually show up when you roll.

Plateau flags

Sweep flags the parts of your game that have gone quiet, so a plateau turns into a plan.

Milestones

From your first class to tapping a higher belt, Sweep marks the moments most logs miss.

Mat time & streaks

Hours on the mat, active days, and the streak that keeps you honest about showing up.

Gi & no-gi

Tag every session, then filter every stat by gi, no-gi, or all. Two games, tracked apart.

A look inside

There is a lot more under the hood.

Logging, technique tracking, gameplans, competition prep and more. Swipe through real screens from the app.

Your training is yours

No feed. No followers. No AI guessing on your behalf.
